title: Felineification
description: Felineification! Let your hearts adventure and your eye boggle! (may contain fur)
body:
Felineification! Let your eye boggle and your hearts speed up at this fluffy modpack!
Felineification is a vanilla+ modpack aimed at providing the player game-changing features without straying too far from vanilla.

**Check out our [Offical Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/felineification-16x)**


<details>
